allow: Bash(node -e "const ai = require\(''ai''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(ai\).filter\(k => k.includes\(''Stream''\) || k.includes\(''stream''\) || k.includes\(''Chat''\) || k.includes\(''chat''\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const ai = require\(''ai''\); const r = ai.streamText; console.log\(''streamText found''\); const st = new Object\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(st\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\(''zod''\); console.log\(''zod version:'', z.z ? ''v4'' : ''v3''\)")
Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\(''zod''\); console.log\(typeof z.object, typeof z.string, typeof z.number\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(''''/dev/stdin'''',''''utf8''''\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(''''version:'''', p.version\); console.log\(''''exports:'''', JSON.stringify\(p.exports?.[''''.''''],null,2\)?.substring\(0,300\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\(''./node_modules/zod/package.json''\); console.log\(''version:'', p.version\); console.log\(''has v4 export:'', !!p.exports?.[''./v4'']\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\(''./node_modules/zod/package.json''\); console.log\(''version:'', p.version\); const exps = p.exports || {}; console.log\(''exports keys:'', Object.keys\(exps\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\(''./node_modules/ai/package.json''\); console.log\(''ai version:'', p.version\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.peerDependencies}; console.log\(''zod dep:'', deps.zod\)")
